title: Rename device - Renamed, Home screen
scenario: Renamed device name in Device Settings > General is not reflected on the Home screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap Device Settings (gear icon) for the connected device
Tap the device name field and rename the device (e.g., change to "My Poly Headset")
Tap Save or Back to confirm
expected: The renamed device name is displayed on the Home screen.
